creator: scf@FreeBSD.org
text:
Testing again with shotcut-22.06.23_2 and mlt7-7.22.0 on FreeBSD 14-STABLE has a working timeline for me.

This bug appears fixed.  The update to 22.12.21 in this issue looks to be superseded by bug 271775.  I will let the maintainer decide if this bug should be closed.
